Description: Over 200 BAND-MAID related reports. Most are updated daily.
Customized version of ChatGPT with extensive knowledge of BAND-MAID and the specific vocabulary used by the band. Good for translations.
Over 450 BAND-MAID GIFs optimized to load quickly.
Complete searchable BAND-MAID songs list. Song details, member quotes, streaming stats updated daily
All known BAND-MAID setlists easily searchable by song, venue, etc. with links to setlist.fm
All BAND-MAID and member tweets from 2013 through September 2025 translated to English
BAND-MAID song sorter with built-in completion estimation
Collection of BAND-MAID image effects, logos, etc. in a known place which enables reliable, public links to the images.
My github page where all of these various projects are hosted including this one
OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI. The official BAND-MAID fan club website which is a subsection of their main page.
The website for MAIDIT. Seems to be a placeholder at present, but messages can be sent to band management.
